2604.21450.title: VARestorer: One-Step VAR Distillation for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
2604.21450.paper_summary: Recent advancements in visual autoregressive models (VAR) have demonstrated their effectiveness in image generation, highlighting their potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR). However, adapting VAR for ISR presents critical challenges. The next-scale prediction mechanism, constrained by causal attention, fails to fully exploit global low-quality (LQ) context, resulting in blurry and inconsistent high-quality (HQ) outputs. Additionally, error accumulation in the iterative prediction severely degrades coherence in ISR task. To address these issues, we propose VARestorer, a simple yet effective distillation framework that transforms a pre-trained text-to-image VAR model into a one-step ISR model. By leveraging distribution matching, our method eliminates the need for iterative refinement, significantly reducing error propagation and inference time. Furthermore, we introduce pyramid image conditioning with cross-scale attention, which enables bidirectional scale-wise interactions and fully utilizes the input image information while adapting to the autoregressive mechanism. This prevents later LQ tokens from being overlooked in the transformer. By fine-tuning only 1.2\% of the model parameters through parameter-efficient adapters, our method maintains the expressive power of the original VAR model while significantly enhancing efficiency. Extensive experiments show that VARestorer achieves state-of-the-art performance with 72.32 MUSIQ and 0.7669 CLIPIQA on DIV2K dataset, while accelerating inference by 10 times compared to conventional VAR inference.
2604.21450.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視覺自回歸模型（VAR）方面的進展顯示了它們在圖像生成中的有效性，突顯了它們在現實世界圖像超解析度（Real-ISR）中的潛力。<lb/>然而，將VAR應用於ISR面臨著關鍵挑戰。<lb/>受因果注意力限制的下一階段預測機制未能充分利用全球低質量（LQ）上下文，導致模糊和不一致的高質量（HQ）輸出。<lb/>此外，迭代預測中的錯誤積累嚴重降低了ISR任務的一致性。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了VARestorer，一個簡單但有效的蒸餾框架，將一個預訓練的文本到圖像VAR模型轉換為一個一步的ISR模型。<lb/>通過利用分佈匹配，我們的方法消除了迭代精煉的需求，顯著減少了錯誤傳播和推理時間。<lb/>此外，我們引入了帶有跨尺度注意力的金字塔圖像條件，這使得雙向尺度交互成為可能，並在適應自回歸機制的同時充分利用輸入圖像信息。<lb/>這防止了後期LQ標記在Transformer中被忽視。<lb/>通過僅微調1.2\%的模型參數，使用參數高效的適配器，我們的方法保持了原始VAR模型的表現力，同時顯著提高了效率。<lb/>廣泛的實驗表明，VARestorer在DIV2K數據集上達到了最先進的性能，MUSIQ為72.32，CLIPIQA為0.7669，同時與傳統VAR推理相比，加速推理速度達到10倍。
2604.21450.author: Yixuan Zhu et.al.
2604.21450.authors: Yixuan Zhu, Shilin Ma, Haolin Wang, Ao Li, Yanzhe Jing, Yansong Tang, Lei Chen, Jiwen Lu, Jie Zhou
